chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5826 - جُبِلَتِ اَلْقُلُوبُ عَلَى حُبِّ مَنْ أَحْسَنَ إِلَيْهَا وَ بُغْضِ مَنْ أَسَاءَ إِلَيْهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5826 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Hearts are naturally inclined to love those who do good to them and to dislike those who harm them."
